Good morning

Thank you for submitting your application.  I would be happy to help.  I do want to mention that the 2 bedroom units are in Building A, which are still under construction.  The estimated date of Occupancy is not until the end of April.  Would you still be interested?

Best,


[cid:e1b0a333-ab82-40b3-b395-074c66f68cd4]

Karen Grisso
Property Manager

Parkside Heights
3097 SE Meek St, Milwaukie, OR 97222

503-919-2404



quantumresidential.com


________________________________
